title: Hat Yai、Songkhla — 生活成本、住房與搬遷指南 [2026]
description: Hat Yai、Songkhla的完整指南：生活成本、房價、社區、遠程工作準備情況和搬遷建議。
content:
概述

Hat Yai是Songkhla的一個城市，人口約400,000。The commercial hub of southern Thailand, popular with Malaysian visitors and expats, offering a multicultural atmosphere and very affordable living.

Last updated: July 21, 2026
